books.title: Jane Eyre
books.author: Charlotte Brontë
books.summary: A woman is hired by the mysterious master of Thornfield Hall as a governess for his young ward.

books.title: The Story of Doctor Dolittle
books.author: Hugh Lofting
books.summary: A kindhearted doctor who can speak the language of animals embarks on a whimsical adventure to Africa.

books.title: Up from Slavery
books.author: Booker T. Washington
books.summary: The autobiography of Booker T. Washington, former slave and founder of the Tuskegee Institute.

books.title: Tombstone
books.author: Walter Noble Burns
books.summary: An embellished retelling of the town of Tombstone, Arizona, during its heyday in the late 19th century, featuring famous heroes and outlaws of the American Old West.

books.title: Just William
books.author: Richmal Crompton
books.summary: An eleven-year old English boy gets involved in a continuous series of amusing adventures to the exasperation of his long-suffering family.

books.title: Our American Cousin
books.author: Tom Taylor
books.summary: A rough American from a distant branch of the Trenchard family returns to England and quickly becomes embroiled in the family’s affairs.

books.title: Short Plays
books.author: J. M. Synge
books.summary: A collection of three short plays by J. M. Synge.

books.title: Through the Looking-Glass
books.author: Lewis Carroll
books.summary: In a follow-up to her adventures in Wonderland, Alice finds herself in a mirror image of the whimsical land where she becomes a queen in her own right.

books.title: Cornelli
books.author: Johanna Spyri
books.summary: A young girl’s emotional hurt requires time and love to heal.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Edgar Allan Poe
books.summary: A collection of Edgar Allan Poe’s short fiction, ordered by date of publication.

books.title: Seven Pillars of Wisdom
books.author: T. E. Lawrence
books.summary: T. E. Lawrence’s memoir of leading the Arab revolt against the Ottoman empire during World War I.

books.title: The Poisoned Chocolates Case
books.author: Anthony Berkeley
books.summary: A club of amateur sleuths attempts to solve a crime whose solution has eluded Scotland Yard.

books.title: The Rough Riders
books.author: Theodore Roosevelt
books.summary: The First United States Volunteer Cavalry fights in the Spanish–American War.

books.title: The Kural
books.author: Thiruvalluvar
books.summary: An Indian weaver-philosopher expounds on the subjects of righteousness, wealth, and love.

books.title: Verses on Various Occasions
books.author: John Henry Newman
books.summary: A collection of poems by John Henry Newman.

books.title: A Woman of No Importance
books.author: Oscar Wilde
books.summary: A mother’s secretive past clashes with high society when her son is offered an irresistible position with a charismatic nobleman.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Poul Anderson
books.summary: A collection of science fiction short stories by Poul Anderson ordered by date of publication.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: H. G. Wells
books.summary: A collection of short stories by H. G. Wells in a variety of genres ordered by date of publication.

books.title: Gitanjali
books.author: Rabindranath Tagore
books.summary: Prose poems of offering translated by the author from the original Bengali.

books.title: The Four Men
books.author: Hilaire Belloc
books.summary: Hilaire Belloc takes a pilgrimage across his beloved home English county of Sussex writing as four distinct personalities, with a wide variety of songs, stories, and digressions.
